title: Database schema: signals_api_keys + signals_api_usage tables
acceptance_criteria: signals_api_keys table created with all spec columns: id, account_id, name, key_hash, tier, stripe_customer_id, stripe_subscription_id, webhook_url, webhook_secret_hash, created_at, last_used_at, revoked_at
signals_api_usage table created: key_id, period_start, request_count with composite PK
Python SQLAlchemy model created in trading/models/signals.py matching table schema
